# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is a self-paced workshop for Onyx, a graphical user-interface for structural equation modeling.

\![images/somemodels.png\]

We assume that you already familiar with the basics of Structural Equation Modeling.

The workshop has some introductory chapters that cover basic workflow elements in Onyx, such as basics of model specification, evaluating model fit, or specifying multiple group models.
